channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti tag on brickwork, 27th June
item.description:
Just outside Little Elms nursery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on black boxes, 27th June
item.description:
Beckenham Green directly opposite Kinleigh Folkard & Hayward Estate Agents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th June
item.description:
The flytipping is still outside Block C’s door despite being marked as resolved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-60, Kirby Grove, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A cabinet and some other bits of funiture, 27th June
item.description:
This has been dumped on the path way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Offenham Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green recycling bin full of rubbish been dumped on grass area, 27th June
item.description:
Recycling bin been dumped full of rubbish on the green opposite 78 prestbury square its in the corner next to bush
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of rubbish been dumped, 27th June
item.description:
This is on both corners of close house hold rubbish and furniture
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Steyning Grove, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long carpet carboard role been dumped, 27th June
item.description:
This is on the grass along with other general rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Framlingham Crescent, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bag full of rubbish dumped next to tree, 27th June
item.description:
Black bag of rubbish dumped by tree and loads of general waste all over the green areas
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside the shop to the right of Savers, 27th June
item.description:
Pavement is broken and a very dangerous trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike blocking property entrance, 27th June
item.description:
Bike blocking property entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balls Pond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brambles overgrown, 27th June
item.description:
Brambles are overgrown and are protuding over and through the fence, they have a lot of thorns at eye level and you have to duck to avoid them
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Welland Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 50 Streatley Road, 27th June
item.description:
A very large pothole which is dangerous for cyclists

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food bin still not fixed, 27th June
item.description:
This food bin has been vandalised and looks unsightly, if should have been secured to the wall by the bin shed and not by the entrance of page house as if would make it harder for people to vandalise it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Welland Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin has fallen off mount, 27th June
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Lane, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2nd floor, 27th June
item.description:
Dog Poo on second floor stairs. The lift is out of service, so going to end up everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fort Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins all over the floor, 27th June
item.description:
Rubbish all over the floor behind the shops to many rats during the nights

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 27th June
item.description:
More fly-tipping blacking foot access on Copperfield Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copperfield Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 rubbish bags dumped in The Avenue opposite No 7 on the South Side of The Avenue, 27th June
item.description:
2 bags of rubbish, one green bag and one black bag, have been dumped beside a tree on the south side of The Avenue, opposite No 7 The Avenue. Please can they be removed....thanks!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian stop light out, 27th June
item.description:
Middle road facing south
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127, Notting Hill Gate, Notting Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike abandoned in The Avenue opposite Repton Court, 27th June
item.description:
A Lime bike has been abandoned in The Avenue opposite Repton Court on the grass verge on the north side of The Avenue. Please can it be removed....thanks!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
